messages.content: You are a coding agent. Preserve failing commands, file paths, stack traces, and exit codes.
Run tests and diagnose the failing proxy behavior.

$ npm test

> token-slimmer@0.2.0 test
> node --test

2026-06-26T10:00:00.000Z INFO loading test/proxy.test.js
2026-06-26T10:00:00.010Z INFO starting proxy forwards chat completions
2026-06-26T10:00:00.020Z INFO upstream received POST /v1/chat/completions
2026-06-26T10:00:00.030Z INFO checking custom provider headers
2026-06-26T10:00:00.040Z INFO checking token estimate headers
2026-06-26T10:00:00.050Z INFO completed proxy forwards chat completions
2026-06-26T10:00:00.060Z INFO starting streaming chat completions are proxied as streams
2026-06-26T10:00:00.070Z INFO upstream received stream request
2026-06-26T10:00:00.080Z ERROR AssertionError [ERR_ASSERTION]: expected status 201 but received 200
    at TestContext.<anonymous> (C:\repo\test\proxy.test.js:143:10)
    at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)
    at async Test.run (node:internal/test_runner/test:632:9)
    at async Test.processPendingSubtests (node:internal/test_runner/test:374:7)
actual: 200
expected: 201
operator: strictEqual
2026-06-26T10:00:00.090Z WARN stream response status was overwritten after headers copied
2026-06-26T10:00:00.100Z INFO dumping relevant code
function sendUpstreamResponse(upstreamRes, res, report, stream) {
  copyResponseHeaders(upstreamRes, res);
  if (report) setReportHeaders(res, report);
  res.status(upstreamRes.status);
  if (stream && upstreamRes.body) {
    Readable.fromWeb(upstreamRes.body).pipe(res);
    return;
  }
  const text = await upstreamRes.text();
  res.send(text);
}
